heading: Additional remedies
label: 1713 Additional remedies
text: The rights and remedies provided by this chapter shall be in addition to any and all other rights and remedies that may exist at law or in equity.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of two hundred and seventy days after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 1, 1968section 1423 of Pub. L. 90–448section 1701 of this title
